NEW React Native + Expo

Build Better Habits, One Day at a Time

HabitFlow is a beautifully crafted mobile habit tracker. Set goals, track streaks, and build the life you want with daily micro-habits.

Powerful Features

📊

Visual Progress

Track your daily, weekly, and monthly progress with beautiful charts and streak counters.

🔔

Smart Reminders

Never miss a habit with customizable push notifications at the perfect time.

🎯

Goal Setting

Set weekly and monthly goals. Watch your consistency grow over time.

📱

Offline First

Works 100% offline. Your data is stored locally on your device.

🔥

Streak Tracking

Build momentum with streak counters that motivate you to keep going.

🎨

Beautiful UI

Material Design 3 interface that's a joy to use every single day.

Built With Modern Tech

React Native 0.85 Expo 55 TypeScript React Navigation 7 AsyncStorage React Native Paper
